div.p: Each Vec<f32> is a separate heap allocation. Memory addresses are scattered. CPU prefetcher cannot predict access pattern.
Single allocation for all vector data. Sequential memory addresses. CPU prefetcher anticipates access pattern.
HashMap<u64, (index, generation)> O(1) lookup by vector ID
Index maps external IDs to internal slot positions for O(1) retrieval. Generation counters prevent ABA bugs.
L1/L2 cache loads 64 bytes at once. Aligned access = single cache load. Misaligned = 2 cache loads (penalty).
